name: Jindal Stainless (Hisar) Limited
summary: Jindal Stainless (Hisar) Limited manufactures and sells stainless steel products in India. The company offers a range of products, including slabs, blooms, hot and cold rolled coils, plates, coin blanks, precision strips, and razor blade steel. It also provides customized stainless steel products; and inventory management, technical value engineering, warehousing, and material testing services. In addition, the company offers stainless steel products for use in modular kitchen, kitchenware, and home and footprint office accessories, as well as cooking utensils under the Arttdinox, Stainless Steel Modular Kitchens, and Krome brands; and operates a network of steel service centers. Its products are used in various applications, such as process and engineering; architecture, building, and construction; automotive, railway, and transport; and consumer durables. The company also exports its products. Jindal Stainless (Hisar) Limited was incorporated in 2013 and is based in New Delhi, India.
